{{Quote|The blue guards started telling everyone to clear the doors, and then people started shouting back. They [the protestors] tried to push back, and that's when the rifles came out.|Lia Reicheds|<ref name="HNN55">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|news/1359_1.html|Anti-War Rally Dispersed by Senate Guard}}</ref>}}
'''Lia Reicheds''' was a [[Clerk/Legends|clerk]] who worked in the [[Senate Building/Legends|Senate Building]] during the time of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] began, Reicheds witnessed a violent protest against the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]] outside the Senate which forced the clerk to come through the angry crowds to get into work.<ref name="HNN55" />

==Appearances==
